title: Infancy Gospel of Thomas
text: # Infancy Gospel of Thomas — Literal Version

title: Infancy Gospel of Thomas
text: Infancy Gospel of Thomas - Literal Public Domain

title: Infancy Gospel of Thomas
text: I, Thomas the Israelite, tell unto you, that all the children of Israel who were with him, and Joseph his father, went to sow in the field. And Jesus also went with them.
